# Coherent Design Method

> "BMAD for frontend" - AI-powered design system generator

This repository contains the source code for Coherent CLI and Core packages.

## Repository Structure

```
coherent-design-method/
├── packages/
│   ├── cli/          # @coherent/cli - CLI interface
│   ├── core/         # @coherent/core - Core engine
│   └── docs/         # Technical documentation
├── docs/             # User documentation
└── .github/          # GitHub workflows
```

## Development

See main [README.md](../README.md) for development setup.

## Publishing

Packages are published to npm automatically via GitHub Actions when a release is created.
